arts.sum: Ajax will be seeking their third consecutive Eredivisie win this weekend. The Amsterdammers have only dropped points in two of their previous league matches, recording one draw and one loss. Francesco...

arts.ttl: Fenerbahçe open talks to sign Ajax defender Ahmetcan Kaplan
arts.sum: According to Turkish outlet Fanatik, Süper Lig giants Fenerbahçe have entered negotiations to sign out-of-favour Ajax youngster Ahmetcan Kaplan. The 21-year-old centre-back has been limited to just six first-team appearances…

arts.ttl: Ajax reach personal agreement with Valladolid winger Raúl Moro
arts.sum: Weeks after all the speculation started, Ajax have finally made a significant step towards signing Real Valladolid winger Raúl Moro. According to De Telegraaf, Ajax have reached a personal agreement…

arts.ttl: Preview: Ajax vs. RKC Waalwijk - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Eredivisie clash between Ajax and RKC Waalwijk, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
